Localization.Description: An attempt to perform operations on Microsoft Windows services using the command line or PowerShell is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An attempt of the user {subject.account.name} to perform operations on Microsoft Windows services using the command line is detected on host {event_src.host}
An attempt of the user {subject.account.name} to perform operations on Microsoft Windows services using PowerShell is detected on host {event_src.host}
An attempt of the user {subject.account.name} to hide a service is detected on host {event_src.host}
